title: mv
html:
mv

File Write

Context: sudo, suid, unprivileged

echo DATA >/path/to/temp-file
mv /path/to/temp-file /path/to/output-file

Privilege Escalation

Context: sudo, suid

mv /path/to/input-file /path/to/output-file
excerpt: mv File Write Context: sudo, suid, unprivileged echo DATA >/path/to/temp-file mv /path/to/temp-file /path/to/output-file Privilege Escalation Context: sudo, suid mv /path/to/input-file /path/to/out
